ops.title: Loose contracts/ or doc-artifact dirs in a repo tree are wrong — docs go to cc-notes, fixtures go under tests/
ops.body:
User rule (2026-07-19, re captain-hook `contracts/`): a repo-tree dir like `contracts/` holding a README + golden fixtures must not exist as-is. If the content is just documentation → it becomes a cc-notes doc/note attachment (ccn artifacts), not tree markdown. If it's used by tests (golden bytes, fixtures) → it lives in a tests directory (`tests/fixtures/`, `testdata/`), referenced from there. "Apply this logic everywhere" — every repo, not just captain-hook.

**Why:** the tree carries only published docs and source (CLAUDE.md Durable Records rule); loose artifact dirs are session residue that rots.

**How to apply:** when creating goldens, put them under the test tree from the start; when writing contract/decision prose, `doc_add`/`note_add` with attachments instead of a tree README. Sweep for violations when shipping. Related: [[verify-track-state-before-dispatch]].
